description_long: This is a modern bungalow featuring a flat roof and a clean, rectilinear design with large glass windows and sliding doors. The exterior combines wood paneling with concrete or stucco surfaces, giving it a contemporary aesthetic. The structure includes a spacious upper terrace, a ground-level patio, and landscaped surroundings with several mature trees and potted plants. The main entrance is accentuated by a covered porch area, and the property is enclosed by a low fence. A detached, glass-walled room or pavilion is situated nearby, possibly serving as a sunroom or studio. The overall layout emphasizes open-plan living and strong indoor-outdoor connectivity.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, wood paneling, and landscaped outdoor spaces, including a detached glass pavilion.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, large windows, and the detached glass pavilion to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wood-paneled exterior, upper terrace, and landscaped garden with trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, extensive use of glass, and the private backyard area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with dense tree coverage, visible patio, and the detached pavilion on the left.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
